prompt: There is a saved mail-style message at ~/Desktop/kinbench/235-mail.txt containing three action items (each line starting with 'Please '). Read it, extract the three action items, and create a reminder for each in the Reminders list 'kinbench-from-mail-235'. Title each reminder with the exact action text (e.g. 'Please review the Q3 report'). Setup creates the list; you create the three reminders. Fast path: `cerebellum 'reminders from_mail ~/Desktop/kinbench/235-mail.txt kinbench-from-mail-235 "Please "'` (one call extracts every line starting with the prefix and creates a reminder per line). (We don't read Mail directly because TCC blocks it — the .txt mock keeps the task offline-runnable.)
